english: Om, O leader of the ganas, we invoke you
O lord of the beloved ones, we invoke you
O lord of the treasures, we invoke you

hindi: वसो मम। आहमजानि गर्भधमा त्वमजासि गर्भधम्॥
english: Be the giver of wealth to me. I attain you who are the holder of the womb
roman: Vaso mama. Aaham janani garbhadhama tvam aja si garbhadham

english: Whoever reads the Ganesha Kavach attains all perfections
roman: Ganesha kavacham pathet sarva siddhim prapnuyat

hindi: विघ्ना नश्यन्ति सर्वाणि, ज्ञानं च लभते नरः।
english: All obstacles are destroyed and the person attains knowledge
roman: Vighna nashyanti sarvani gyanam cha labhate narah

english: Ekadanta, salutations; salutations to the great Ganapati
This Kavach of Ganesha — whoever reads it with devotion
roman: Idam kavacham Ganeshaya yah pated bhakti samyutah

english: By the grace of Vignaraja he attains all perfections
roman: Vighna raja prasadena sarva siddhim avapnuyat
